metadata.description: Custom systems for herd management. Cattle and small ruminants for dairy and beef.

hero.headline: Precision livestock technology
hero.subheadline: Custom systems that evolve with your herd. From diagnosis to complete implementation, you have online and offline support.

segmentsSection.title: Choose your segment
segmentsSection.subtitle: Every operation is unique. Our systems are adapted to meet the specific needs of your production type.

process.title: How we implement
process.subtitle: A structured process to ensure results from day one.

step1.title: Diagnosis
step1.description: We understand your operation, challenges and objectives to design the ideal solution.

step2.title: MVP
step2.description: We develop an initial version to validate and adjust to your real needs.

step3.title: Implementation + Training
step3.description: We install the system and train your entire team for daily use.

step4.title: Evolution
step4.description: We continuously monitor and improve as your operation grows.

about.title: Technology born in the field
about.p1: We were born from direct field experience. With a background in veterinary medicine and livestock farming since 2011, we understand that precise decisions depend on reliable data — and that most producers still operate without the right tools to obtain them.
about.p2: Seabra Solutions develops custom livestock management systems designed for the reality of each operation. Our software turns data entry into something practical and fast, delivering performance indicators with the precision the industry demands.
about.p3: Each system is built from a diagnosis of your operation. We don't offer generic solutions — we deliver technology that adapts to your process, works offline in the field, and evolves alongside your business.
about.vision: Our vision is to establish Seabra Solutions as a reference in precision livestock technology across Latin America.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real producers share how technology transformed their herd management.

proofs.subtitle: Used by real producers — handling, indicators and reports.

pains.title: Do you face these challenges?
pains.pain3: Lack of visibility on costs and productivity

pains.pain5: Decisions based on guesswork, not data

benefits.title: What you get
benefits.benefit1: Total herd control in one place
benefits.benefit2: Offline access in the field, syncs when connected
benefits.benefit5: System that evolves with your operation

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Does the system work without internet?
faq.a1: Yes! The system was designed to work offline. Data syncs automatically when there's a connection.
faq.a2: We do an initial diagnosis, develop a customized version, implement and train your team.
faq.q3: Can I access from any device?
faq.a3: Yes, the system is responsive and works on computers, tablets and phones.
faq.a4: It depends on the complexity of the operation, but usually between 2 to 4 weeks for the initial version.
faq.a5: Yes, we offer continuous support via WhatsApp, email and video calls.

metadata.title: Web Development
metadata.description: Custom landing pages, e-commerce stores and marketplaces for your business.

hero.title: Your business online, done right
hero.subtitle: We build custom landing pages, e-commerce stores and marketplaces. From design to launch, you get full support.

tiers.title: Choose the right plan for your business
tiers.subtitle: Three solution levels that grow with your needs.

tier1.name: Landing Page
tier1.description: Professional digital presence to showcase your company and products.
tier1.f1desc: Adaptive layout for smartphones, tablets and desktops with performance optimization
tier1.f2desc: Institutional presentation with standout visual elements and intuitive navigation
tier1.f3desc: Product showcase with images, detailed descriptions and categorization
tier1.f4desc: Dedicated section for company history, values and differentials
tier1.f5desc: Integrated contact system with email notification
tier1.f6desc: Direct access buttons for WhatsApp Business communication
tier1.f7desc: Integration with Instagram, Facebook and other social media profiles
tier1.f8desc: Search engine optimization (Google) and structured metadata
tier1.f9desc: Publishing with custom domain and hosting included

tier2.name: E-commerce
tier2.description: Online sales with order management and admin panel.
tier2.f1desc: Complete system with categorization, search and filters by product type
tier2.f2desc: Customers can place orders directly on the site with a structured form
tier2.f3desc: Interface for centralized product management and order viewing
tier2.f4desc: Add, edit and remove products through the admin panel
tier2.f5desc: Automatic emails when new orders are received
tier2.f6desc: Customers can check the progress of their orders
tier2.f7desc: Organized view of all orders received with date and status filters
tier2.f8desc: Mark products as available or temporarily unavailable
tier2.f9desc: View orders by period and most requested products

tier3.name: Marketplace
tier3.description: Multi-vendor platform with complete operational control.
tier3.f1desc: Architecture that allows registration and management of multiple associated vendors
tier3.f2desc: Management interface for controlling vendors, products, orders and metrics
tier3.f3desc: Each vendor manages their own catalog with controlled autonomy
tier3.f4desc: Complete order flow with confirmation, status and history
tier3.f5desc: Automated inventory management system per vendor
tier3.f6desc: Individual pages for each producer with their own branding
tier3.f7desc: Search system with filters by category, vendor, price and availability
tier3.f8desc: Email alerts for vendors and customers about orders and updates
tier3.f9desc: Dashboard with sales metrics, best-selling products and vendor performance
tier3.f10desc: Portal for customers to track orders, history and profile
tier3.f11desc: Development of additional features according to specific needs

cta.title: Ready to take your business online?
cta.subtitle: Get in touch and receive a personalized proposal for your project.
